stories.title: PGA Championship R3 Preview — McNealy, Smalley Lead at -4; Scheffler, McIlroy Lurk (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The PGA Championship heading into Round 3:

Smalley (-4) 🏆
McNealy (-4) 🏆
Scheffler (-2)
McIlroy (+1) — 5 back, bogey-free 67 in R2

Two first-time major leaders. A weekend full of stars in pursuit.

This is what the major season is made for. #PGAChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Round 3 final pairing at the PGA Championship: Smalley and McNealy at 2:40 PM ET.

Neither has ever won on Tour (McNealy has one Fall event).

One of them might be wearing the Wanamaker Trophy Sunday. #PGAChampionship #Golf

article.headline: PGA Championship Round 3: Smalley and McNealy Lead at -4 as Scheffler, McIlroy Lurk

stories.title: McIlroy's Grand Slam Quest — From Disaster to "Right in the Tournament" (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy called his Round 1 "s***."

He then went out and shot a bogey-free 67 in Round 2.

He's at +1, five back. "At five back I do feel like I'm right in the tournament."

Grand Slam dream still alive. #RoryMcIlroy #PGAChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
If Rory McIlroy wins the PGA Championship this week, he completes the career Grand Slam.

He's five back entering Round 3. He's done more with less.

The most compelling story in golf is still happening. #RoryMcIlroy #PGAChampionship

article.headline: McIlroy Grand Slam Dream Still Alive After Bogey-Free Round 2 at PGA Championship

stories.title: LIV Golf's Future in Doubt — Saudi PIF Ending Funding After 2026 (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Saudi Arabia's PIF is pulling LIV Golf funding at end of 2026.

$6 billion spent. Chairman stepping down. New investment bankers on board.

The league that changed golf forever is now searching for a future.

What happens next? #LIVGolf #Golf

article.headline: Saudi PIF Pulls LIV Golf Funding After 2026 — The League's Future Is Now in Question

stories.title: Smalley and McNealy — The Unlikely Major Leaders (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Alex Smalley has never won on Tour.
It's only his 5th major.
He leads the PGA Championship.

Maverick McNealy has one Fall event win.
He leads the PGA Championship.

Golf is incredible. #PGAChampionship #Golf

article.headline: Smalley and McNealy: Two Unlikely Co-Leaders at the PGA Championship

stories.title: LPGA Queen City — Yamashita Wins at -17; Korda Finishes T5 (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Moka Yamashita wins the Kroger Queen City Championship at -17.

Nelly Korda finishes T5 at -15, falling short of her 23rd LPGA title.

Yamashita goes wire-to-wire in Cincinnati. A brilliant performance. #LPGA #Golf

article.headline: Moka Yamashita Wins Kroger Queen City Championship at -17; Korda Finishes T5
